message:
feat(providers): add image support in tool result messages across all providers

Providers now correctly handle image content blocks in tool results,
enabling multimodal tool outputs to flow through to the LLM APIs:

- Azure: tool results emit multi-part content with ImageUrl when images
  are present, single-text optimization when only text; also reorders
  finish_reason processing to occur AFTER delta accumulation so that
  TextEnd/ToolCallEnd events contain complete content; removes unused
  current_text field from AzureStream state
- OpenAI: tool results support multi-part content with image_url parts,
  preserving the single-text optimization for text-only results
- Gemini: tool result content extraction now handles Image blocks with
  a descriptive placeholder, fixes role comment (user, not model)
- Cohere: user content extraction handles Image blocks with metadata
  description fallback instead of silently dropping them
- Bedrock: adds Image variant and BedrockImageBlock/BedrockImageSource
  structs to the content enum for future image-in-tool-result support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
